items.name: Dual-Tip Pastel Brush Pens
items.description: Premium 12-pack brush pens featuring a flexible brush tip on one end and a fine 0.4mm bullet tip on the other. Ideal for modern calligraphy, hand lettering, and journal illustration in soft, beautiful pastel colors.

items.name: Leather-Bound Bullet Journal
items.description: Exquisite A5 dotted journal wrapped in cruelty-free vegan leather. Featuring ultra-thick 160 GSM ink-proof paper, a secure elastic band, two ribbon markers, and a handy back pocket. Designed to keep your ideas organized.
